title: Bolyra Conformance Test Vector Schema
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for Bolyra conformance test vectors. Validates the common structure of all vector types without per-type sub-schemas.

version.description: Semantic version of the test vector suite (e.g., '0.4.0')

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this vector

description.description: Human-readable description of what this vector tests

type.description: The category of conformance behavior being tested. 'external_verifier' is an IO-contract class: the runner spawns the built 'bolyra verify' CLI and diffs the stdout verdict, OR — when inputs.static_verdict is present — validates a literal verdict object against the §3.4 verdict schema without spawning (used to exercise the proof-system `kind` self-description across classes). See spec/external-verifier-contract-v1.md.

status.description: Stability level of this vector; experimental vectors may change without notice

inputs.description: Arbitrary key/value inputs supplied to the construct under test

result.description: Whether this input combination should pass or fail conformance

verdict.description: For 'external_verifier' vectors: the expected wire verdict on the CLI's stdout

code.description: For 'external_verifier' deny vectors: the expected denial code from the External Verifier Contract v1 registry

kind.description: For 'external_verifier' static-verdict vectors: the expected verifier proof-system self-description (External Verifier Contract v1 §3.5). An absent verdict `kind` defaults to 'zk'.

expected.description: Expected outcome, including result and any additional behavioral checks
